title: Point Reyes Light — December 6, 2001 (Page 18)
author: Point Reyes Light Staff
card_summary: A single page from the Point Reyes Light, a weekly community newspaper serving Point Reyes Station, California, dated December 6, 2001, Page 18. This posthumous issue may contain coverage related to PKD's literary legacy or community items connected to his former residence in the Point Reyes area.
page_summary:
A scanned newspaper page from the Point Reyes Light (Point Reyes Station, California), dated Thursday, December 6, 2001, page 18. The clipping was sourced from Newspapers.com and downloaded on April 4, 2025. The PDF text layer contains only source metadata with no recoverable article text.

This clipping dates from December 2001, shortly after the release of the Steven Spielberg film Minority Report (based on Dick's short story) was generating pre-release publicity. The continued preservation of clippings from Dick's former Marin County community reflects the archive's systematic approach to documenting the local context of Dick's life and posthumous legacy.
